author: mark
text:
Unify the state checkout — retire federated mode

Collapse the master_url 'mode' into one un-moded mechanism per docs/SPEC-tracker-state.md. config.json carries an optional state_url/state_branch tracker address; absent resolves to (origin, balls/tasks). Store::discover materializes ONE checkout, .balls/state-repo, for every repo via tracker_address::resolve + state_repo::ensure. The .balls/worktree-vs-.balls/state-repo split, the .balls/master.json pointer, the config-symlink seam, and the federate.rs flip are retired; legacy master.json / in-config master_url / state_remote read transparently and rewrite to state_url on the next bl remaster.

bl remaster <url> writes the address and reconciles local-only tasks; --detach clears it and re-roots, offline-capable. Reachability: hard-fail an unreachable explicit tracker on first contact, local git-init fallback for the implicit default, soft-fail warm. An existing standalone .balls/worktree migrates to .balls/state-repo in place.

Ships the twelve SPEC §16 conformance tests; the README and SKILL.md are rewritten for the unified model.
